result: Completed Phase 1.2 of Postgres Migration. Fixed schema.pg.sql.ts import source (sqlite-core → pg-core). Rewrote 5 stub .pg.sql.ts files (session/session.pg.sql.ts [6 tables], project/project.pg.sql.ts, account/account.pg.sql.ts [3 tables], control-plane/workspace.pg.sql.ts, share/share.pg.sql.ts) with real pgTable() definitions. Created 3 missing .pg.sql.ts files (sync/event.pg.sql.ts [2 tables], data-migration.pg.sql.ts, event/event.pg.sql.ts). All 9 files use proper imports from drizzle-orm/pg-core, use pgTable() instead of sqliteTable(), use jsonb() for JSON columns, and use boolean() for boolean columns. Typecheck passes with 0 new errors (107 total, below 115 pre-existing baseline).
